craigslist.title: Tailored for pet lovers! 2 Bed/2 Bath in our pet-friendly community.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Welcome to Vivid Apartment Homes! 2003 Oakhill Dr San Antonio, TX 78238 Call us today! show contact info Rental Size: 2 BR - 2 BA - 1006 sq ft Monthly Price: $1239 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Lease Length: 6-Month, 12-Month Our one- and two-bedroom apartments are available in both renovated and classic styles. Renovated homes feature updated vinyl flooring, matte black fixtures, and modern finishes, while every apartment includes a fully equipped kitchen, granite-inspired countertops, and a private patio or balcony. Enjoy community amenities like our sparkling pool, fitness center, dog park, outdoor lounge, and on-site laundromat. Plus, exciting upgrades are coming soon. Our community features: ❖ Barbecue and Grilling Area ❖ Clubhouse ❖ Laundry Facility ❖ Off-street Parking ❖ Outdoor Lounge Area ❖ Pet-Friendly ❖ Bark Park ❖ Fitness Center ❖ Paid Lawn Care ❖ Sundeck ❖ Swimming Pool Our apartment features: ❖ Black Appliances ❖ Ceiling Fans in Select Units ❖ Fully-equipped Kitchen ❖ Personal Balcony or Patio ❖ Extra Storage Space ❖ Granite-inspired Countertops ❖ Tile Kitchen Backsplash ❖ Wood-inspired Flooring in Select Units Call us today! -- show contact info -- Our Pet-Policy: Pets Welcome Upon Approval. No breed, weight, or size restrictions. Limit of 2 pets per home. Non-refundable pet fee is $300. Monthly pet rent of $20 will be charged per pet. Rabies shot must be provided. Large aquariums will require additional proof of insurance. Please call office for details. Pet Amenities: Bark Park Website: www.rentalsapts.com?n=vivid&rp=fSLdUifh9YEQ&t=wb Online Application: www.rentalsapts.com?n=vivid&rp=fSLdUifh9YEQ&t=ap Schedule a Tour: www.rentalsapts.com?n=vivid&rp=fSLdUifh9YEQ&t=sch All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice.
